title: Hey Jude
why_this_song: Hey Jude by The Beatles (1968) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 43 times; first heard in: "Hey Jude, don't make it bad"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Take a sad song and make it better"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Hey Jude, don't make it bad"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Na-na-na-na, hey Jude (Jude, Judy, Judy, Judy, Judy, Judy)"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Take a sad song and make it better"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Hey Jude, don't make it bad
Take a sad song and make it better
Remember to let her into your heart
Then you can start to make it better

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "jude" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "jude" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "better" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "better" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey Jude, don't make it bad
You're waiting for someone to perform with
Na-na-na-na, hey Jude (Jude, Jude, Jude, Jude, Jude)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Take a sad song and make it better
Better, better, better, better, better, better, oh

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Hey Jude" was released in 1968. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hey Jude" foi lançada em 1968. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Hey Jude" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Hey Jude" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
